name: Local 20 Ibew
description_short: Local 20 IBEW Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union serving electrical workers and their families in the Grand Prairie, TX area with competitive loan rates and comprehensive financial services.
description_long:
Local 20 IBEW Federal Credit Union operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution serving members of Local 20 International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers and Local 756 Sign Painters & Decorators, plus their direct family members. The credit union has been operating with a mission centered on the cooperative principle of "People Helping People," which defines the credit union movement broadly. The institution is NCUA-insured and maintains a physical branch location in Grand Prairie, Texas, where it has established itself as a community-focused financial provider.

The credit union offers a comprehensive range of financial products and services including checking and savings accounts, auto loans, signature loans, MasterCard credit cards, and various ACH-based services. As of May 2024, they advertise competitive rates including new auto loans at 4.00% APR and signature secure loans at 5.00% APR. Members have access to online banking, loan calculators, trade-in valuation tools, and direct deposit services. The institution also recently joined the AllPoint Network to expand ATM access for members at $2.00 per transaction on their side.

What distinguishes Local 20 IBEW FCU is its membership-restricted model, which creates a tight-knit community focused on electrical workers and their families. The credit union provides value-added benefits such as no-cost Accidental Death and Dismemberment insurance through a partnership with American Income Life Insurance Company. Additionally, members benefit from ACH origination and distribution services that provide flexibility in managing payroll allocation across multiple accounts and loan payments without employer involvement.

However, prospective members should note that membership is restricted to a specific union and their families, which significantly limits accessibility compared to community banks or open-membership credit unions. The credit union operates limited hours (8:30 AM–5:00 PM weekdays only) and maintains a single physical location. While competitive rates are advertised, actual approval and rates depend on creditworthiness. The website contains outdated information (holiday closures listed for 2026, July 2022 fee updates), suggesting potential maintenance issues.
services: ACH distribution across multiple accounts and loan payments
ACH debit setup for pre-authorized vendor payments
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.00% APR with approved credit as of May 2024
No-cost Accidental Death and Dismemberment insurance benefit for all members through American Income Life partnership
ACH Distribution service allows members to split direct deposits across multiple accounts and loans without employer involvement
Access to AllPoint Network ATMs nationwide with only $2.00 per transaction fee on the credit union's side
Toll-free customer support available at 877-341-7390 in addition to local branch
Online banking platform with loan calculators and trade-in valuation tools
Full-service credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards under one institution
cons: Membership is restricted to Local 20 IBEW and Local 756 Sign Painters & Decorators members and their direct family only, limiting accessibility
Single physical branch location in Grand Prairie, TX with limited hours (8:30 AM–5:00 PM weekdays only)
MasterCard credit card carries 11.75% APR, which is higher than many alternatives available to creditworthy consumers
Website contains outdated information including 2026 holiday closures and fees from July 2022, suggesting potential maintenance neglect
Limited information provided on savings account rates, CD terms, or other deposit product specifics
best_for: Local 20 IBEW union members seeking competitive auto loan rates and consolidated financial services
Electrical workers and their families who want union-affiliated credit union membership with community-focused service
Members prioritizing no-cost insurance benefits and ACH flexibility for multi-account payroll management
Individuals in the Grand Prairie, TX area with union affiliation looking for local relationship banking
diagnosis: Local 20 IBEW FCU is best for union-affiliated electrical workers and their families seeking competitive loan rates and consolidated financial services within their community. The primary caveat is that membership is strictly limited to Local 20 IBEW and Local 756 Sign Painters & Decorators members plus their direct relatives, making it inaccessible to the general public.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
